title: A Rest-frame K-band View of Bulge Growth in Massive Dusty Star-forming Galaxies at z~2
comment: See Figure 4 for the key result that the stacked F770W and ALMA 870 micron profiles agree closely out to 8 kpc. Comments are welcome. Submitted to ApJ
summary: We study bulge formation in 16 massive dusty star-forming galaxies at z~2 by combining JWST MIRI F770W imaging, NIRCam imaging in eight bands, and ALMA 870 um data. At the median redshift of z=2.18, the F770W band probes the rest-frame 2.4 um light, close to the rest-frame K band, and traces the stellar mass distribution with little effect from dust attenuation. The effective radii measured in F770W agree with those of the 870 um dust emission, with a median ratio of 0.95, and are typically 23% smaller than those in F444W. The rest-frame K-band imaging is therefore essential to measure the true extent of the stellar mass, which is as compact as the dusty star-forming regions. In stacks of the 16 galaxies at a matched resolution, the 870 um and F770W profiles agree closely out to 8 kpc, and a bulge plus disk decomposition of the F770W stack gives a bulge-to-total ratio of 0.50. Fitting the SEDs in radial bins with CIGALE, we find that the attenuation decreases from Av=2.6 mag at the center to 1.5 mag at $r\gtrsim7$ kpc, while the specific star formation rate profile is flat. In these galaxies the bulge is already in place, and the whole system grows toward compact quiescent galaxies within about 1 Gyr. In two galaxies, by contrast, the 870 um emission is 3 to 6 times more compact than the F770W light, which suggests that they are still in the bulge-building compaction phase. Our sample may thus catch massive galaxies in several phases of bulge formation.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用JWST和ALMA数据，分析了红移z~2的16个巨大尘埃星暴星系中的核球形成过程。发现静止帧K波段（F770W）与870微米尘埃辐射的尺度高度一致，核球占总质量比约50%，并且系统在约10亿年内向致密静止星系演化。
AI.motivation: 理解高红移（z~2）大质量尘埃星暴星系中核球结构的形成机制，探究它们如何演化为致密的静止星系。
AI.method: 结合JWST MIRI F770W成像、NIRCam八个波段数据以及ALMA 870微米数据，对16个星系进行结构分解（核球-盘）、径向SED拟合（CIGALE）和堆叠分析。
AI.result: 1）F770W有效半径与870微米辐射尺度高度一致（中位数比值0.95），比F444W测得的半径小23%；2）堆叠分析显示核球-盘分解得到核球占比0.50；3）消光从中心Av=2.6 mag降至外围1.5 mag，比恒星形成率剖面平坦；4）两个星系的870微米比F770W紧凑3-6倍，处于核球形成压实阶段。
AI.conclusion: 这些星系正处于核球形成的不同阶段：多数星系核球已形成，将在大约10亿年内演化为致密静止星系；少数星系仍处于核球形成的压实阶段。静止帧K波段成像对测量恒星质量真实分布至关重要。

recommendation.reason: 该论文聚焦于z~2大质量尘埃星暴星系的核球形成，核心方法结合了JWST和ALMA数据，与用户画像中的dusty star-forming galaxies、ALMA、JWST、star formation rate等关键词高度匹配。论文主题属于用户主要兴趣领域（高红移星系动力学和恒星形成），且使用了用户画像中高频出现的观测手段（ALMA、JWST）。虽然未直接涉及强引力透镜，但高红移尘埃星暴星系的结构演化是用户画像中明确关注的方向。
recommendation.topic_fit: 高红移尘埃星暴星系的结构演化与核球形成，与用户画像中的dusty star-forming galaxies、star formation rate、ALMA、JWST等关键词高度吻合。
recommendation.method_fit: 结合JWST MIRI/NIRCam成像和ALMA 870微米数据，进行结构分解和径向SED拟合，与用户画像中常用的多波段观测和结构分析方法一致。
recommendation.author_fit: 作者Ken-ichi Tadaki不在用户核心作者列表中，但论文合作者可能包含用户画像中的作者（未列出），且论文主题与用户核心作者群的研究方向（如Reinhard Genzel、Hannah Übler等的高红移星系研究）有重叠。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 利用静止帧K波段（F770W）直接追踪恒星质量分布，并与尘埃辐射尺度对比，揭示了核球形成阶段，具有较高的新颖性。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文未涉及强引力透镜，但高红移星系结构演化是用户明确兴趣方向，因此不构成降分理由。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们通过结合JWST MIRI F770W成像、八个波段的NIRCam成像以及ALMA 870微米数据，研究了红移z~2处16个大规模尘埃恒星形成星系的核球形成。在z=2.18的中位红移处，F770W波段探测静止帧2.4微米光，接近静止帧K波段，并且几乎不受尘埃消光影响地追踪恒星质量分布。在F770W中测量的有效半径与870微米尘埃发射的有效半径一致，中位比值为0.95，并且通常比F444W中的有效半径小23%。因此，静止帧K波段成像对于测量恒星质量的真实范围至关重要，该范围与尘埃恒星形成区域一样致密。在匹配分辨率下对这16个星系的叠加中，870微米和F770W的轮廓在8千秒差距内紧密吻合，对F770W叠加的核球加盘分解给出了核球与总体的比值为0.50。使用CIGALE对径向分箱的SED进行拟合，我们发现消光从中心的A_V=2.6星等下降到r≳7千秒差距处的1.5星等，而比恒星形成率轮廓是平坦的。在这些星系中，核球已经就位，整个系统在大约10亿年内向致密静止星系演化。相比之下，在两个星系中，870微米发射的致密程度是F770W光的3到6倍，这表明它们仍处于核球形成的压实阶段。因此，我们的样本可能捕捉到了处于核球形成几个阶段的大质量星系。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这些星系正处于核球形成的不同阶段：多数星系核球已形成，将在大约10亿年内演化为致密静止星系；少数星系仍处于核球形成的压实阶段。静止帧K波段成像对测量恒星质量真实分布至关重要。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: The sample of 16 massive star-forming galaxies
figures.caption_zh: 表1：16个大质量恒星形成星系样本

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Azimuthally averaged radial profiles of the F770W PSF models, normalized at the peak. The empirical PSF (circles) is the median stack of 21 Gaia-selected stars, and the dotted curve shows the STPSF model. The adopted hybrid PSF (solid curve) follows the empirical stack at \(r\leq 1\farcs 0\) (dashed vertical line) and the rescaled model wing at larger radii.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：F770W PSF模型的方位角平均径向轮廓，在峰值处归一化。经验PSF（圆圈）是21颗盖亚选择恒星的中间叠加，虚线曲线显示STPSF模型。采用的混合PSF（实线曲线）在\(r\leq 1\farcs 0\)（虚线垂直线）处遵循经验叠加，在更大半径处遵循重新缩放后的模型翼部。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: F770W images and GALFIT residuals of the 16 galaxies. For each galaxy, the left panel shows the F770W cutout ( \(4^{\prime\prime}\) on a side, arcsinh stretch) and the right panel shows the residual of the \(n=1\) fit on a linear scale from \(-5\sigma\) to \(+5\sigma\) . The green contours show the neighbor masks built from the F444W images. The white circle and the white bar in the first panel show the PSF FWHM ( \(0\farcs 281\) ) and a length of \(1^{\prime\prime}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：16个星系的F770W图像和GALFIT残差。对于每个星系，左面板显示F770W切片（边长\(4^{\prime\prime}\)，反双曲正弦拉伸），右面板显示\(n=1\)拟合的残差，线性尺度从\(-5\sigma\)到\(+5\sigma\)。绿色轮廓显示从F444W图像构建的邻域掩模。第一个面板中的白色圆圈和白色条显示PSF半高全宽（\(0\farcs 281\)）和\(1^{\prime\prime}\)的长度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Circularized effective radii of the F770W emission (this work, \(n=1\) ) compared with those of the 870 \(\mu\) m dust continuum (Tadaki et al., 2020 , left panel) and those of the F444W emission (Tadaki et al., 2023 , right panel) for the 16 galaxies. The dashed lines show the one-to-one relations. The F770W error bars are the statistical uncertainties from the empty-sky perturbation analysis (Section III.2 ) and are mostly smaller than the symbols. The four outliers discussed in the text are labeled.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：16个星系的F770W发射（本研究，\(n=1\)）的圆化有效半径与870 \(\mu\) m尘埃连续谱（Tadaki等人，2020，左面板）以及F444W发射（Tadaki等人，2023，右面板）的比较。虚线显示一对一关系。F770W误差棒来自空天扰动分析（第三节II部分）的统计不确定性，且大多小于符号。文中讨论的四个异常值已标注。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Radial surface-brightness profiles of the stacked emission, normalized at the peak. Left panel. The F770W stack (red) and the 870 \(\mu\) m stack (black). The shaded bands show the total 1 \(\sigma\) uncertainties (noise \(+\) sample), and the dotted curve shows the PSF of the F770W stack, to which all the bands are matched. The two profiles agree closely out to \(r\simeq 1^{\prime\prime}\) ( \(\simeq\) 8 kpc). Right panel. The profiles of the nine JWST bands. The profiles become more compact toward longer wavelengths, which shows the radial color gradient of the stacked light.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：叠加发射的径向表面亮度轮廓，在峰值处归一化。左面板：F770W叠加（红色）和870 \(\mu\) m叠加（黑色）。阴影带显示总1 \(\sigma\)不确定性（噪声\(+\)样本），虚线曲线显示F770W叠加的PSF，所有波段均与之匹配。两个轮廓在\(r\simeq 1^{\prime\prime}\)（\(\simeq\) 8千秒差距）内紧密吻合。右面板：九个JWST波段的轮廓。轮廓在较长波长处变得更致密，这显示了叠加光的径向颜色梯度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Bulge–disk decomposition of the radial profile of the F770W stack. The left panel shows the stacked profile (points with total 1 \(\sigma\) uncertainties) and the best-fit PSF-convolved model (solid curve), which consists of an exponential disk ( \(n=1\) , blue dashed) and a de Vaucouleurs bulge ( \(n=4\) , orange dashed) with \(B/T=0.50\) . The right panel shows the residuals normalized by the total uncertainty.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：F770W叠加径向轮廓的核球–盘分解。左面板显示叠加轮廓（带总1 \(\sigma\)不确定性的点）和最佳拟合PSF卷积模型（实线曲线），该模型由一个指数盘（\(n=1\)，蓝色虚线）和一个德沃库勒核球（\(n=4\)，橙色虚线）组成，\(B/T=0.50\)。右面板显示按总不确定性归一化的残差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Left panel. Best-fit SEDs of the five radial bins (curves) and the observed photometry (points). The SEDs are those of a representative galaxy with the median F770W flux of the sample, and the fluxes decrease from the central resolution element ( \(r=0\) , dark purple) to the outermost annulus ( \(r=1\farcs 14\) , yellow). The open downward triangle marks the 5 \(\sigma\) upper limit (F090W in the outermost annulus). The bottom sub-panel shows the fractional residuals, \(({observed}-{model})/{model}\) , of the five bins, each shifted vertically with the dashed line marking its zero point, from the central resolution element (top) to the outermost annulus (bottom). Right panels. The five regions on the F770W (top) and 870 \(\mu\) m (bottom) stack images. The cross marks the central resolution element ( \(r=0\) ), and the circles show the boundaries of the four annuli. The labels give the central radius of each annulus ( \(r=0\farcs 30\) , \(0\farcs 58\) , \(0\farcs 86\) , and \(1\farcs 14\) ), which is used as the radial coordinate of the corresponding SED. The dashed contour shows the 3 \(\sigma\) level of the sky noise.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：左面板：五个径向分箱的最佳拟合SED（曲线）和观测测光（点）。SED是样本中具有中位F770W通量的代表性星系的SED，通量从中心分辨率元（\(r=0\)，深紫色）减小到最外环（\(r=1\farcs 14\)，黄色）。开口向下三角形标记5 \(\sigma\)上限（最外环中的F090W）。底部子面板显示五个分箱的分数残差\(({observed}-{model})/{model}\)，每个分箱垂直偏移，虚线标记其零点，从中心分辨率元（顶部）到最外环（底部）。右面板：F770W（顶部）和870 \(\mu\) m（底部）叠加图像上的五个区域。十字标记中心分辨率元（\(r=0\)），圆圈显示四个环的边界。标签给出每个环的中心半径（\(r=0\farcs 30\)，\(0\farcs 58\)，\(0\farcs 86\)和\(1\farcs 14\)），用作相应SED的径向坐标。虚线轮廓显示天空噪声的3 \(\sigma\)水平。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Radial profiles of the stellar mass surface density (top left), the SFR surface density (top right), the attenuation \(A_{V}\) (bottom left), and the sSFR (bottom right) from the CIGALE fits to the radial-bin SEDs. The error bars on the central values show the Bayesian uncertainties of the fits, and the shaded bands show the 16–84% spread of the 50 bootstrap realizations, which we adopt as the parameter errors. The sSFR is the ratio of two fitted parameters, and its error bars show the SFR uncertainty after the stellar-mass uncertainty is subtracted in quadrature, because the amplitude uncertainty is common to the two parameters and cancels in the ratio. The stellar mass and SFR surface densities are those of a representative galaxy with the median F770W flux of the sample.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：来自CIGALE对径向分箱SED拟合的恒星质量面密度（左上）、SFR面密度（右上）、消光\(A_{V}\)（左下）和sSFR（右下）的径向轮廓。中心值的误差棒显示拟合的贝叶斯不确定性，阴影带显示50次自举实现的16-84%散布，我们将其作为参数误差。sSFR是两个拟合参数的比值，其误差棒显示在恒星质量不确定性以平方差方式减去后的SFR不确定性，因为振幅不确定性对两个参数是共同的，并在比值中抵消。恒星质量和SFR面密度是样本中具有中位F770W通量的代表性星系的。

title: Microlensing of Microlensing: Effects of Random Stars on the Double-Source-Plane Gravitational Lens
summary: Microlensing, the influence of stars within a galactic gravitational lens, has emerged as a powerful probe of compact mass and, through differential magnification, sub-parsec scale sources at cosmological distances. The recent discovery of a double-source-plane gravitational lens system in which the most distant source is a quasar offers the prospect of compound microlensing, in which quasar light rays are influenced by compact masses within the two foreground lensing galaxies. Here, we present the first numerical simulations of this "microlensing of microlensing". We consider the recently discovered "Einstein zig-zag" lens, J1721+8842, as a fiducial case, and construct microlensing magnification maps for each of the six quasar images in this system. Due to the secondary microlensing effects of the myriad of initial microimages, the resulting maps contain more complex caustic features than seen in the case of single plane microlensing. This is reflected in the expected lightcurves seen for each of the images.

AI.tldr: 本文首次对双源平面引力透镜系统中的“复合微引力透镜效应”（微引力透镜的微引力透镜）进行了数值模拟，以J1721+8842系统为例，发现次级微透镜效应会产生更复杂的焦散结构，并影响各像的光变曲线。
AI.motivation: 最近发现的双源平面引力透镜系统中，最远的源是类星体，这提供了复合微引力透镜效应（即类星体光线受两个前景透镜星系中致密天体影响）的研究机会，但目前缺乏相应的数值模拟研究。
AI.method: 以J1721+8842（“爱因斯坦之字形”透镜）为基准案例，为系统中六个类星体像分别构建微引力透镜放大图，通过数值模拟研究复合微透镜效应。
AI.result: 由于次级微透镜效应（大量初始微像的影响），得到的放大图包含比单平面微透镜更复杂的焦散特征，各像的光变曲线也呈现出相应差异。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现了双源平面引力透镜系统中的复合微引力透镜效应的数值模拟，揭示了其更复杂的焦散结构和对光变曲线的影响。

recommendation.reason: 该论文聚焦于引力透镜系统中的微引力透镜效应，特别是双源平面系统中的复合微引力透镜，与用户Zotero画像中的核心主题（lens, lensing, gravitational lens）高度匹配。虽然论文主要涉及类星体而非用户最偏好的星系-星系强引力透镜，但强引力透镜建模和微透镜模拟方法与用户兴趣高度相关。论文作者不在核心作者列表中，但主题和方法契合度较高。
recommendation.topic_fit: 论文主题为引力透镜中的微引力透镜效应，与用户画像中的'lens'、'lensing'、'gravitational lens'等关键词高度匹配。用户偏好星系-星系强引力透镜，而本文涉及双源平面透镜系统，属于强引力透镜的延伸，因此主题契合度较高。
recommendation.method_fit: 论文采用数值模拟方法构建微引力透镜放大图，分析焦散结构和光变曲线，这与用户画像中常见的引力透镜建模、暗物质子结构探测等方法高度一致。
recommendation.author_fit: 论文作者（Nada Salama, Daniel J. Ballard等）不在用户的核心作者列表中，因此作者契合度较低。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 论文首次对双源平面系统中的复合微引力透镜效应进行数值模拟，具有较高的新颖性，与用户关注前沿研究的倾向相符。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主要关注类星体微透镜，而非用户最偏好的高红移星系动力学、分子气体或尘埃研究，但强引力透镜的核心主题仍使其具有较高相关性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 微引力透镜效应，即星系引力透镜中恒星的影响，已成为探测致密质量以及通过微分放大效应研究宇宙学距离上亚秒差距尺度源的有力工具。最近发现的一个双源平面引力透镜系统中，最远的源是一颗类星体，这为复合微引力透镜效应提供了前景，其中类星体的光线受到两个前景透镜星系内致密质量的影响。在此，我们首次展示了这种“微引力透镜的微引力透镜”的数值模拟。我们以最近发现的“爱因斯坦之字形”透镜J1721+8842作为基准案例，并为该系统中六个类星体像中的每一个构建了微引力透镜放大图。由于大量初始微像的次级微引力透镜效应，所得放大图包含比单平面微引力透镜情况更复杂的焦散特征。这反映在每个像的预期光变曲线中。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，首次实现了双源平面引力透镜系统中的复合微引力透镜效应的数值模拟，揭示了其更复杂的焦散结构和对光变曲线的影响。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Illustration of the fiducial DSPL configuration employed in this study, the Einstein zig-zag lens J1721+8842. Light rays from source 2 (s2, a quasar at \(z=2.38\) ) are deflected by source 1 (s1, a galaxy at \(z=1.885\) ) and the foreground lens at \(z=0.184\) , producing six lensed images labelled \(A\) – \(F\) . The observer’s sky projection shows the resultant image. The dashed rays denoting the trajectory of images \(D\) and \(F\) to the s2 plane, show the “zig-zag” procedure in action, where the images switch places between the s1 plane and the foreground lens plane. We discuss our approach to modelling of this system in Appendix A .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：本研究中采用的基准双源平面透镜配置示意图，即爱因斯坦之字形透镜J1721+8842。来自源2（s2，红移\(z=2.38\)的类星体）的光线被源1（s1，红移\(z=1.885\)的星系）和前景透镜（红移\(z=0.184\)）偏折，产生六个标记为\(A\)–\(F\)的透镜像。观测者的天球投影显示了最终的像。虚线表示像\(D\)和\(F\)到s2平面的轨迹，展示了“之字形”过程，其中像在s1平面和前景透镜平面之间交换位置。我们在附录A中讨论了对该系统建模的方法。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : The F814W HST data of J1721 used to fit a macrolensing model, with quasar images \(A\) – \(F\) labelled as in Dux et al. ( 2025 ) The black contours highlight the lensed images of s1, plotted for illustrative purposes only.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：用于拟合宏透镜模型的J1721的F814W HST数据，类星体像\(A\)–\(F\)的标记与Dux等人（2025）一致。黑色等高线突出显示了s1的透镜像，仅用于示意。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : The s1-plane magnification maps at images \(ABCD\) (left) and images \(EF\) (right). Parameters used to construct these maps are taken from Table 3
figures.caption_zh: 图3：像\(ABCD\)（左）和像\(EF\)（右）处的s1平面放大图。构建这些图所用的参数取自表3。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : The effective magnification, convergence and shear magnitude and direction \([{deg}]\) , as observed at the six image-plane quasar locations, predicted from our median macromodel result.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：根据中值宏模型结果预测的六个像平面类星体位置处的有效放大率、会聚度和剪切大小及方向\([{deg}]\)。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Magnification, convergence and shear magnitude and direction \([{deg}]\) of the foreground lens plane only, at the six image plane quasar locations, predicted from our median macromodel result.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：根据中值宏模型结果预测的六个像平面类星体位置处的前景透镜平面放大率、会聚度和剪切大小及方向\([{deg}]\)。

figures.caption_en: Table 3 : Magnification, convergence and shear magnitude and direction \([{deg}]\) of the s1 plane only, at the two s1-plane quasar locations, predicted from our median macromodel result.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：根据中值宏模型结果预测的两个s1平面类星体位置处的s1平面放大率、会聚度和剪切大小及方向\([{deg}]\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Illustration of convexity violation seen in compound microlensing. Here, the inside of a caustic is labelled as region \(a\) , and the outside is region \(b\) . Left: caustic of the first kind, where both folds are convex relative to region \(a\) . Right: caustic of the second kind, where one fold is concave relative to region \(a\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：复合微引力透镜中凸性破坏的示意图。此处，焦散内部标记为区域\(a\)，外部为区域\(b\)。左：第一类焦散，两个折叠相对于区域\(a\)均为凸。右：第二类焦散，一个折叠相对于区域\(a\)为凹。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7 : Examples of caustic structures in the microlensing magnification maps, relevant features are outlined in a white dashed line. (a) A swallowtail caustic in map \(ABCD\) . (b) A butterfly caustic in map \(ABCD\) . (c)–(e) Convexity-violating caustics in maps \(C\) , \(E\) , and \(F\) , respectively. Panel (e) shows a lip caustic, which is not permitted in single-plane lensing (Petters and Wicklin, 1995 ) . The white bar in each panel corresponds to a length of \(0.25\,R_{{E}}^{{s2}}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图7：微引力透镜放大图中焦散结构的示例，相关特征用白色虚线标出。(a) 图\(ABCD\)中的燕尾焦散。(b) 图\(ABCD\)中的蝴蝶焦散。(c)–(e) 分别在图\(C\)、\(E\)和\(F\)中的凸性破坏焦散。面板(e)显示了一个唇形焦散，这在单平面透镜中是不允许的（Petters和Wicklin，1995）。每个面板中的白色条对应长度为\(0.25\,R_{{E}}^{{s2}}\)。

title: The Intrinsic Multiphase Gas--Black Hole Connection across Scales in IllustrisTNG
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, 1 table. ApJ accepted. Comments are welcome
summary: The relationship between supermassive black holes and the multiphase circumgalactic medium is central to understanding the co-evolution of galaxies and their central black holes. We investigate this relationship using the IllustrisTNG100 simulation with a sample of 5089 central galaxies at $z=0$, measuring the partial correlation between central black hole mass and the mass of cold ($T < 10^4$K), cool ($10^4 \le T < 10^5$K), warm ($10^5 \le T < 10^6$K), and hot ($T \ge 10^6$K) gas within $0.03R_{200}$, $0.15R_{200}$, and $R_{200}$, after accounting for stellar and dark matter halo mass. We find that after removing these confounding factors, black hole mass shows a significant negative partial correlation ($ρ\approx -0.37$) with cold gas within $R_{200}$ and $0.15R_{200}$, whereas warm and hot gas exhibit no substantial intrinsic correlation. The residual plane reveals a threshold pattern: galaxies with over-massive black holes show systematically reduced cold gas, consistent with the cumulative impact of AGN feedback. The anti-correlation persists across environments with a weak trend in local density, and varies with galaxy type (star-forming, green valley, and quenched). These results provide a quantitative multiphase diagnostic of AGN feedback in TNG and support a picture in which feedback progressively removes cold gas, offering testable predictions for future multiwavelength surveys.

AI.tldr: 基于IllustrisTNG100模拟，研究发现超大质量黑洞质量与星系周冷气体质量呈显著负相关（ρ≈-0.37），而暖热气体无显著关联，支持AGN反馈逐渐移除冷气体的图景。
AI.motivation: 理解超大质量黑洞与多相星系周介质的关系，对于揭示星系与中心黑洞的共同演化至关重要。
AI.method: 使用IllustrisTNG100模拟中5089个中心星系样本，在控制恒星质量和暗物质晕质量后，测量黑洞质量与不同温度气体（冷、凉、温、热）在多个半径范围内的偏相关。
AI.result: 黑洞质量与冷气体呈显著负偏相关（ρ≈-0.37），与暖热气体无本质关联；存在阈值模式：黑洞质量过大的星系冷气体系统性减少。
AI.conclusion: 结果支持AGN反馈逐渐移除冷气体的物理图像，为未来多波段巡天提供了可检验的预测。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为利用IllustrisTNG模拟研究z=0处黑洞质量与多相冷气体的关系，属于AGN反馈和星系演化范畴。用户兴趣高度集中于强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学和多相气体，但本文为z=0的模拟研究，未涉及透镜、高红移或观测方法，且无核心作者重叠。虽然多相气体主题部分匹配，但整体偏离用户主要研究方向。
recommendation.topic_fit: 部分匹配：多相气体（冷、暖、热）与用户兴趣中的多相气体相关，但用户更关注高红移（cosmic noon）和透镜星系中的气体，而本文为z=0的模拟研究。
recommendation.method_fit: 不匹配：使用流体模拟（IllustrisTNG）和偏相关分析，用户兴趣集中在强引力透镜观测、ALMA/JWST成像和动力学建模。
recommendation.author_fit: 不匹配：作者Xiaoxia Zhang、Taotao Fang等均不在用户核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中等：揭示了黑洞质量与冷气体的负相关，但基于模拟且z=0，对用户高红移透镜研究的新颖性有限。
recommendation.negative_reason: 缺乏强引力透镜、高红移（z>1）、观测数据（ALMA/JWST）或核心作者；纯模拟且红移为零，与用户主要兴趣领域差异较大。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 超大质量黑洞与多相星系周介质之间的关系是理解星系及其中心黑洞共同演化的核心。我们利用IllustrisTNG100模拟，对z=0处的5089个中央星系样本，测量了在考虑恒星和暗物质晕质量后，中心黑洞质量与0.03R_{200}、0.15R_{200}和R_{200}内冷（T < 10^4K）、温（10^4 ≤ T < 10^5K）、暖（10^5 ≤ T < 10^6K）和热（T ≥ 10^6K）气体质量之间的偏相关。我们发现，在去除这些混杂因素后，黑洞质量与R_{200}和0.15R_{200}内的冷气体呈现显著的负偏相关（ρ≈ -0.37），而暖气体和热气体则没有表现出实质性的内在相关性。残差平面揭示了一个阈值模式：黑洞质量过大的星系系统性地表现出冷气体减少，这与AGN反馈的累积影响一致。这种反相关在不同环境中持续存在，与局部密度呈弱趋势，并随星系类型（恒星形成、绿谷和熄灭）而变化。这些结果为TNG中AGN反馈提供了定量的多相诊断，并支持反馈逐渐移除冷气体的图像，为未来的多波段巡天提供了可检验的预测。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论支持AGN反馈逐渐移除冷气体的物理图像，为未来多波段巡天提供了可检验的预测。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Number of galaxies with non-zero gas mass in each phase and aperture
figures.caption_zh: 表1：每个相和孔径内具有非零气体质量的星系数量

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Raw gas–BH correlations at three radial scales. Total gas mass (excluding star-forming gas cells) within \(0.03R_{200}\) (left), \(0.15R_{200}\) (middle), and \(R_{200}\) (right) is plotted against black hole mass. Colors indicate galaxy type: star-forming (blue), green valley (green), and quenched (red). Contours (light blue for star-forming, dark red for quenched) show the 2D density distribution; green valley galaxies are not shown with contours due to their small sample size. Spearman correlation coefficients \(\rho\) for star-forming (SF), green valley (GV), and quenched (Q) galaxies are given in each panel; *** indicates \(p<0.001\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：三个径向尺度上的原始气体–BH相关性。在\(0.03R_{200}\)（左）、\(0.15R_{200}\)（中）和\(R_{200}\)（右）内的总气体质量（不包括恒星形成气体单元）相对于黑洞质量绘制。颜色表示星系类型：恒星形成（蓝色）、绿谷（绿色）和熄灭（红色）。等高线（浅蓝色为恒星形成，深红色为熄灭）显示二维密度分布；由于样本量小，绿谷星系未用等高线显示。每个面板中给出了恒星形成（SF）、绿谷（GV）和熄灭（Q）星系的斯皮尔曼相关系数\(\rho\)；***表示\(p<0.001\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Intrinsic partial correlations and gas mass fractions. Left panel: partial correlation heatmap for the full sample, after accounting for \(\log M_{*}\) and \(\log M_{dm}\) via group-specific regressions. Colors represent Spearman’s \(\rho\) ; numbers in cells are \(\rho\) values with significance levels ( *** for \(p 5\%\) contribution.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：内在偏相关和气体质量分数。左面板：全样本的偏相关热图，在通过组特定回归考虑\(\log M_{*}\)和\(\log M_{dm}\)后。颜色表示斯皮尔曼\(\rho\)；单元格中的数字是\(\rho\)值，带有显著性水平（***表示\(p<0.001\)，**表示\(p<0.01\)，*表示\(p<0.05\)，无标记表示\(p\geq0.05\)）。右面板：每个相和孔径内气体质量分数（气体质量除以总重子质量）的分布。箱线图显示中位数、四分位距和1.5倍四分位距范围。每个面板顶部的数字表示该相和孔径内气体质量分数中位数对总气体质量分数中位数的贡献百分比；仅显示贡献>5%的项。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Residual plot for the strongest intrinsic anti-correlation from Figure 2 (cold gas within \(R_{200}\) ), showing gas mass residuals against BH mass residuals after removing \(\log M_{*}\) and \(\log M_{dm}\) . Colors follow Figure 1 . Gray contours show the 2D density distribution. Black circles with error bars are binned means \(\pm 1\sigma\) (six equal-frequency bins). The horizontal line marks zero gas residual. The Spearman partial correlation coefficient is given in the upper left.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：图2中最强内在反相关（\(R_{200}\)内的冷气体）的残差图，显示在去除\(\log M_{*}\)和\(\log M_{dm}\)后气体质量残差相对于BH质量残差。颜色遵循图1。灰色等高线显示二维密度分布。带误差棒的黑点是分箱均值\(\pm 1\sigma\)（六个等频箱）。水平线标记零气体残差。左上角给出了斯皮尔曼偏相关系数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Dependence on star formation activity. Left, middle, and right panels show partial correlation heatmaps for star-forming, green valley, and quenched galaxies, respectively. Significance levels follow the convention of Fig. 2 .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：对恒星形成活动的依赖性。左、中、右面板分别显示恒星形成、绿谷和熄灭星系的偏相关热图。显著性水平遵循图2的惯例。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Local density effect. Left panel shows the bootstrap distributions of the partial correlation coefficient for cold gas within \(R_{200}\) for low, medium, and high local density groups (based on \(\Sigma_{5}\) ), computed using the same group-specific regression and pooling procedure as in Fig. 2 . Boxes mark the interquartile range, horizontal lines inside the boxes indicate the median, and whiskers extend to the 5th and 95th percentiles. The dashed line marks zero correlation. Right panel shows binned residual means for the same density groups. Error bars denote \(\pm 1\sigma\) in each bin.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：局部密度效应。左面板显示了低、中、高局部密度组（基于\(\Sigma_{5}\)）中\(R_{200}\)内冷气体偏相关系数的自助法分布，使用与图2相同的组特定回归和合并程序计算。箱线标记四分位距，箱内水平线表示中位数，须线延伸至第5和第95百分位数。虚线标记零相关。右面板显示了相同密度组的分箱残差均值。误差棒表示每个箱内的\(\pm 1\sigma\)。

title: LoVoCCS. III. Third Generation Pipeline & The Hercules Supercluster
summary: The Local Volume Complete Cluster Survey (LoVoCCS) is a volume-complete survey of over one-hundred nearby ($0.03 < z < 0.12$), X-ray luminous ($L_{500} > 10^{44} \text{ erg s}^{-1}$) galaxy clusters in the southern sky. Observations for the survey concluded in December 2025, reaching Vera C. Rubin Observatory's Legacy Survey of Space and Time (LSST) Year 1-2 depth in each field and providing observations with $\lesssim 1"$ seeing for weak lensing science. In this paper, we present the latest pipeline for reducing observations using the third-generation of the LSST Science Pipelines. We use recent observations of the Hercules Supercluster to validate the pipeline's data-products and conduct an extensive multi-plane weak-lensing analysis of a $\sim 16 \text{ deg}^2$ complex covering Abell 2147, 2151, 2152, and several additional structures. We confirm that the dynamical mass of the complex is biased due to the dynamical state of Abell 2147, which is consistent with being $\sim 0.2-0.4 \text{ Gyr}$ out-of periapsis, and estimate that the total mass of the supercluster is $8.9^{+1.7}_{-1.4} \times 10^{14}~M_{\odot}$.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了LoVoCCS巡天项目，利用LSST科学处理流水线对南天近邻X射线亮星系团进行观测研究，并通过Hercules超星系团的弱引力透镜分析验证了数据产品，估计其总质量为8.9×10¹⁴ M⊙。
AI.motivation: 为了完成对南天近邻X射线亮星系团的体积完整巡天，并验证新一代LSST科学处理流水线的数据产品性能，同时通过弱引力透镜分析揭示超星系团的质量分布与动力学状态。
AI.method: 使用LSST第三代科学处理流水线处理LoVoCCS观测数据，对Hercules超星系团中约16平方度的复杂区域（包括Abell 2147、2151、2152等结构）进行多平面弱引力透镜分析。
AI.result: 确认了复合体的动力学质量因Abell 2147的动力学状态（约距离近心点0.2-0.4 Gyr）而产生偏差，估计超星系团总质量为8.9^{+1.7}_{-1.4} × 10¹⁴ M⊙。
AI.conclusion: 成功验证了LSST科学处理流水线在LoVoCCS数据上的有效性，为后续更大规模的弱引力透镜研究奠定了基础。

recommendation.reason: 该论文主要关注近邻星系团巡天和弱引力透镜分析，与用户主要兴趣领域（高红移星系强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学与多相气体）不匹配。虽然涉及弱引力透镜，但科学目标（近邻超星系团质量测量）和方法（多平面弱透镜）与用户核心兴趣（高红移星系-星系强透镜、高红移星系运动学）差异显著。用户核心作者均未出现，且论文主题偏向星系团宇宙学而非用户聚焦的强引力透镜研究。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。论文主题为近邻星系团弱引力透镜质量测量，与用户高红移强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、分子气体等核心主题不匹配。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。使用弱引力透镜分析星系团质量，与用户常用的强引力透镜建模、高分辨率分子气体观测等方法不同。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。论文作者均不在用户核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 低。论文介绍巡天流水线和超星系团质量测量，对用户领域的新颖性有限。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文聚焦近邻星系团弱引力透镜，偏离用户高红移强引力透镜和星系动力学核心兴趣。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 本地体积完整星系团巡天（LoVoCCS）是一个体积完整的巡天项目，覆盖了南天一百多个邻近（$0.03 < z < 0.12$）、X射线明亮（$L_{500} > 10^{44} \text{ erg s}^{-1}$）的星系团。该巡天的观测于2025年12月结束，每个天区达到维拉·C·鲁宾天文台时空遗产巡天（LSST）第1-2年深度，并提供用于弱引力透镜科学的$\lesssim 1"$视宁度观测。本文介绍了使用第三代LSST科学处理流水线进行观测处理的最新流程。我们利用武仙超星系团的最新观测数据验证了该流水线的数据产品，并对一个覆盖阿贝尔2147、2151、2152及其他若干结构的约$16 \text{ deg}^2$复合区域进行了广泛的多平面弱引力透镜分析。我们确认该复合区域的动力学质量因阿贝尔2147的动力学状态而产生偏差，该状态与其处于$\sim 0.2-0.4 \text{ Gyr}$的近心点外一致，并估计该超星系团的总质量为$8.9^{+1.7}_{-1.4} \times 10^{14}~M_{\odot}$。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，成功验证了LSST科学处理流水线在LoVoCCS数据上的有效性，为后续更大规模的弱引力透镜研究奠定了基础。
